title: Reconcile managed prefix route egress
description: Track whether prefix-route egress is or was RPL-managed. Rebuild managed prefix paths on host-route reparent and fail closed when managed egress disappears, while preserving never-managed static prefixes.
acceptance_criteria: Reparent and disappear tests pass; static-prefix preservation tests remain; no stale managed path survives.
close_reason: Tracked RPL-managed host and prefix egress provenance internally, rebuilt managed prefix paths on host reparent, expired managed prefixes when egress disappeared, preserved never-managed static prefixes, and retained shared capacity accounting. Full RPL/node tests and strict scoped Clippy pass.
